  "findings": [
    "Crane operations in progress within minimum approach distance of energized power lines without required encroachment prevention measures."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all crane operations and boom movement.",
    "Contact utility owner/operator to de-energize and ground lines or confirm voltage and minimum clearance distance.",
    "Implement encroachment prevention measures per OSHA 1926.1407-1410 before resuming work (e.g., dedicated spotter, proximity alarms, insulating barriers, or de-energizing).",
    "Conduct a pre-lift planning meeting to review load charts and power line clearance requirements."
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a crane near energized power lines without verified clearance or required safety measures is a critical life-safety hazard and a direct violation of OSHA 1926 Subpart CC. The work must stop immediately until the hazard is controlled.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.1407 (Power line safety—up to 350 kV)",
    "OSHA 1926.1408 (Power line safety—over 350 kV)",
    "OSHA 1926.1410 (Power line safety—all voltages)",
    "OSHA 1926.1400 (Scope)"
  ]
}
